live_evidence.auth_path: Tesla iOS-app OAuth + Fleet API partner-app (registered at developer.tesla.com)
command_roundtrips_verified: lock -> unlock -> lock (Fleet path, signed-cmd-required vehicle, locked-state transition observed)

p1_findings_resolved: config.Load empty path in fleet-refresh (threaded cfg through runFleetLoginFlow)
ctx discarded in fetchProductsList (now select on ctx.Done with goroutine)
p2_findings_resolved: Silent InsecureSkipVerify fallback on relay cert parse failure (now returns explicit error)
GCM additionalData was nil (now binds magic header bytes into the tag)

notes: First-publish shipcheck. The CLI was used end-to-end during the print session against a real Highland Model 3 and a real Model X. Lock/unlock/charge-limit/honk roundtrips all succeeded over their respective signed-command paths. Round-2 Greptile review identified 2 P1 + 2 P2 findings; all resolved before merge.
